explanations.1: This creates a namespace called 'api' to organize your tables, similar to a folder for database objects.
explanations.7: timestamptz means a timestamp that includes timezone information, so the same moment in time is stored consistently across different regions.
explanations.13: nologin means this role is just a group of permissions that real users will inherit from; it can't log in directly itself.
explanations.18: noinherit means the authenticator role won't automatically get the permissions of other roles it belongs to unless explicitly requested.
explanations.19: This gives the authenticator role all the permissions that web_anon has, essentially saying 'authenticator users can do what web_anon users can do'.
